identity.name: Joseph Jeremy Michael Walker, MBA
identity.title: Artificial Intelligence Systems Architect • Software Engineer • AI Governance Researcher
identity.positioning: Designing trustworthy AI systems through governance, provenance, software architecture, and human-centered engineering.

executiveProfile: Artificial intelligence systems architect with experience designing and deploying production software, AI governance frameworks, decision-support platforms, and knowledge systems across healthcare, commerce, engineering, education, and public infrastructure.

Published researcher in AI governance, provenance-aware computing, multi-agent systems, and software architecture with a portfolio spanning production web applications, published iOS software, AI-assisted operational platforms, and technical disclosures focused on trustworthy artificial intelligence.

Combines scientific research, software engineering, systems architecture, and strategic management to translate emerging AI capabilities into secure, auditable, and human-centered operational systems.

edgeAI.title: Edge AI, Computer Vision & Trusted Inference
edgeAI.summary: Designed edge-AI architectures spanning medical-device OCR, aerial inspection workflows, local model experimentation, and privacy-preserving decision support. Experience includes offline-capable inference, computer vision preprocessing, human-verified extraction, local/remote model orchestration, and provenance-aware interpretation pipelines.

Predictive modeling, clinical decision support, medical imaging, responsible AI, AI evaluation, and translation of machine learning research into safe healthcare systems.

Remote sensing, thermal imaging, RTK mapping, infrastructure inspection, aviation safety, and unmanned aerial systems operations.

achievements: Published multiple peer-discoverable Technical Disclosure Commons disclosures advancing AI governance, software architecture, provenance-aware computing, and trustworthy AI.
Designed and implemented Hermeneia, an AI governance platform emphasizing provenance, semantic contracts, evaluation, and human oversight.
Built and deployed multiple production AI-enabled web platforms integrating secure APIs, operational analytics, payment processing, fulfillment automation, and AI-assisted decision support.
Published multiple production iOS applications through the Apple App Store.
Graduated Magna Cum Laude with Departmental Honors and earned an MBA with a 97th percentile national assessment.
principles: Design AI systems that remain understandable, auditable, and accountable.
Separate deterministic infrastructure from probabilistic inference.
Preserve provenance and chain of custody for decision-critical information.
Build technology that augments human judgment rather than replacing it.
